items.content:
About This Role

We are seeking a talented Product Designer to craft intuitive and delightful user experiences across our platform. You will work end-to-end, from discovery and research through to high-fidelity prototypes and production-ready designs.

You will be embedded within a product squad and collaborate daily with engineers and product managers to ship features that users love. Our design team values craft, curiosity, and empathy in equal measure.

Responsibilities

  • Own the design process from concept to delivery for key product features
  • Conduct user research, usability testing, and synthesize findings into actionable insights
  • Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity mockups in Figma
  • Contribute to and evolve our design system to ensure consistency at scale
  • Partner with engineers to ensure pixel-perfect implementation
  • Present design work to stakeholders and incorporate feedback thoughtfully

Requirements

  • 4+ years of product design experience at a technology company
  • Strong portfolio demonstrating end-to-end design thinking
  • Expert-level proficiency in Figma and modern prototyping tools
  • Experience conducting and synthesizing user research
  • Solid understanding of accessibility standards and responsive design

Nice to Have

  • Experience designing for B2B SaaS products
  • Familiarity with front-end development (HTML, CSS, React)
  • Motion design skills using tools like After Effects or Rive
